items.html: Understand this: previously, the posteriors of them both were entirely Dinim [judgments], and being Dinim, they were attached together, for they all had a single wall. Therefore He cast Durmita [deep slumber] upon him, and the Mochin withdrew from him, as above, which is called sleep. Then his soul — the Mochin that had withdrawn from him — would draw to him Hesed and vitality, to that Kista de Chayuta [measure of vitality] that remains within him, in the body, at the time of sleep, from the Hesed of Bina, and it would spread within him inside. And then the Dinim and the posteriors would withdraw and take hold in the back of the Nukva [female], and they separate from one another. And this is, "Hesed comes and separates them." And this is the secret of, "and in its place, Rachamim [mercy] and Hesed are sunk."
